chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2655 - وَ سَأَلَهُ مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ : عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يَعْصِرُ اَلدُّمَّلَ وَ يَرْبِطُ عَلَيْهِ اَلْخِرْقَةَ فَقَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2655 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar asked Imam (as) about a Muhrim squeezing a boil and tying a cloth around it.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it."
